description:
Replace any scrollable lists of transcription results or session history with a virtualized list (e.g., TanStack Virtual). Only render DOM nodes for visible items plus a small overscan buffer. This is essential for sessions with hundreds of transcription segments.

**Rationale:** Long transcription outputs rendered as full DOM trees cause slow paints and janky scrolling. Virtualization reduces DOM node count from potentially thousands to ~30–50, dramatically improving scroll performance and memory usage.
title: Virtual List for Long Transcription / History Views
